title: DDecadent Energetic Smoked Salmon Bake
description: A charred and tender Norwegian dish featuring gelatin leafs, wood-fired-baked for an energizing and anti-inflammatory-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (such as Dill and Parsley)

instructions: Clean salmon fillets thoroughly, pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix olive oil, lemon zest, red pepper flakes, and fresh herbs. Season the salmon evenly with this mixture.
Arrange gelatin leafs on baking sheet lined with parchment paper to catch any dripping juices.
Place salmon fillets on top of gelatin leafs, skin side up.
Wrap the outside edges of gelatin leafs tightly around the salmon for easy removal after baking.
Place wood chips in a smoker box or direct below salmon if using charcoal grill. Lightly smoke salmon according to instructions provided by your grill type.
Bake at 180°C for 20-25 minutes until salmon reaches an internal temperature of 63°C (145°F).
Remove from oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving with fresh herbs garnished on top.
